external_id.description: An external identifier for the resource.

name.description: A display name for the resource.

description.description: An optional description of the resource.
description.example: Primary workspace for the Acme team

resource_type_slug.description: The slug of the resource type.

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization this resource belongs to.

parent_resource_id.description: The ID of the parent resource. Mutually exclusive with `parent_resource_external_id` and `parent_resource_type_slug`.

parent_resource_external_id.description: The external ID of the parent resource. Required with `parent_resource_type_slug`. Mutually exclusive with `parent_resource_id`.

parent_resource_type_slug.description: The resource type slug of the parent resource. Required with `parent_resource_external_id`. Mutually exclusive with `parent_resource_id`.
